{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323155608E57B27D850AE0899ACF4"}"},"total":234},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7331279497705538354","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看到结局感动到哭成狗，穿越到古代的基建文都大差不差，看开头是觉得有点落入俗套的，性格大大咧咧有点跳脱却有才，对谁都不藏私的女主，只有小说里才会有的绝对支持她施展才能的“王爷”，看进去才发现作者的格局，她不是什么傻白甜，他也不是什么无脑宠女主的工具人，里面的人物都各有自己的闪光点，很精彩的作品，绝对的宝藏，作者大大要加油哦！！！看到评分还没上来有点意难平，所以留个评论希望成为作者大大坚持下去的一点动力，会持续关注的哦[飞吻]","text_exts":[{"e":177,"s":174,"text":"意难平","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%84%8F%E9%9A%BE%E5%B9%B3&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742525680899ACF4%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227331279497705538354%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227235446941956443136%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%84%8F%E9%9A%BE%E5%B9%B3%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1706949118,"group_id":"7235446941956443136","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+H5qQ0j9B9M9MbTaOUao5p6nA02H/fkz8qHJ6T4o2LU","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"2650238625260012","user_name":"第三号666"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2650238625260012","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7235446941956443136","book_info":{"abstract":"【万人迷单箭头+种田+基建+科技+学霸+系统+1V1】
农科院研究员魏元元带着种田系统一朝穿越，成了诸侯国的百户之女。为了保护家人，她只能装成有被说有“特殊爱好”的兄长，硬着头皮替主公种田养猪，绝地求生。
可渐渐，魏元元发现，自家主公和其他诸侯、异族王子、世家贵族们看她的眼神不对劲了。
魏元元：？？？

":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7280186725060690727","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"追到最新章节，感觉这本书评分有点低了。女主不矫情，一心干事业心胸豁达，也没有和男主情啊爱啊的脸红心跳被帅气的脸迷的不要不要的这种烂俗气剧情，好多小说都男女主都没接触过几次就看对眼在一起了，这本书男女主的感情节奏比较慢，属于日久生情（虽然现在还是单箭头哈哈哈）这种推进看着就很舒服。不管主角还是配角描写的都很有辨识度，剧情不拉胯，值得一直追下去"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1695051856,"group_id":"7235446941956443136","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1187903856191511"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7235446941956443136","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.7966211e+07"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读18小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":35629,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":63594,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":31},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7250138872150901542","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"女主这个学霸人设立住了，虽然有系统但是没有那么依赖系统，女主女扮男装活的还挺潇洒，故事情节也挺有趣的，坐等更新！！","text_exts":[{"e":34,"s":30,"text":"女扮男装","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A5%B3%E6%89%AE%E7%94%B7%E8%A3%85&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742525680899ACF4%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227250138872150901542%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227235446941956443136%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A5%B3%E6%89%AE%E7%94%B7%E8%A3%85%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1688054685,"group_id":"7235446941956443136","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info"
